message:
fix(fcp-streaming): saturating_add on messages_received heartbeat counter (resolves br-upgdb)

Resolves flywheel_connectors-upgdb — [REVIEW][LOW]
fcp-streaming/health.rs: messages_received counter still wraps
instead of saturating.

**Previous behavior:**

`StreamHealthTracker::record_heartbeat` at health.rs:134 used
`self.messages_received += 1`. In release builds u64 addition
wraps on overflow, so a tracker that ran long enough to reach
u64::MAX would silently reset to 0 on the next heartbeat,
breaking monotonic-counter health telemetry. The same type
already had the correct discipline on the reconnect_count path
(line 148, `saturating_add(1)`) — this was a one-call-site
inconsistency.

**Fix:**

`messages_received = self.messages_received.saturating_add(1)`,
matching the reconnect_count precedent.

**Regression test:**

`heartbeat_messages_received_saturates_at_u64_max`: pre-set the
counter to u64::MAX (private-field access permitted within the
same module), call record_heartbeat → assert counter stays at
u64::MAX. Second record_heartbeat also stays pinned at the cap.

**Verification:**

- 530 fcp-streaming lib tests + 81 integration = 611 total.
  0 failures.
